---

## Concern

Describe the privacy or safety concern.

## Area

- [ ] Location/GPS
- [ ] Radar
- [ ] Invite link or room code
- [ ] Social card
- [ ] Legal text
- [ ] Physical play safety
- [ ] Other

## Impact

Who could be affected and how?

## Suggested mitigation

If you have a suggestion, describe it here.

## Sensitive details

Do not include real GPS coordinates, addresses, secrets or personal data. For security vulnerabilities, use `SECURITY.md` instead of a public issue.
